title: STAT+: 23andMe offers to connect users’ DNA data with medical records
summary: 23andMe is partnering with HealthEx to allow users to import their medical records, the company said Tuesday at STAT Breakthrough Summit West.

title: STAT+: Marc Tessier-Lavigne addresses new book’s allegations about his conduct in Stanford misconduct case
summary: Former Stanford President Marc Tessier-Lavigne responded publicly for the first time, at a STAT event Tuesday, to allegations in a new book about why he was forced to resign.

title: Trump’s cuts to foreign aid are undermining the Ebola response, insiders say
summary: President Trump's cuts to foreign aid probably hampered the detection of the Ebola outbreak and the response to it.

title: STAT+: Virginia governor vetoes legislation to create an advisory panel to lower the cost of prescription drugs
summary: Virginia's governor vetoed a closely watched effort to create an advisory panel to lower prescription drug costs.

title: STAT+: This spine surgery usually costs $1,400. Under No Surprises Act arbitration? $34,000
summary: A new analysis shows how some clinicians are cashing in on a new process designed to protect patients from surprise bills.

title: How AI helped treat a newborn’s ultra rare disease. ‘It was almost like a light switch.’
summary: The parents of Jorie Kraus told the audience at STAT's Breakthrough Summit West about how AI helped their daughter who was born with a rare disease.

title: STAT+: Canadian medical societies lack sufficient conflict-of-interest policies, study finds
summary: Most Canadian medical societies lack comprehensive policies governing conflicts of interest, and many policies are generally fragmented and narrow in scope, according to a new analysis.

title: STAT+: At a time of tumult at FDA, a former commissioner is hopeful it’s on a better path
summary: With the FDA facing upheaval and personnel exits, former commissioner David Kessler sees an opportunity whereby the agency can make a turn for the better.

title: STAT+: TrumpRx adds generic drugs
summary: A deal with Mark Cuban, Amazon Pharmacy, and GoodRx is boosting TrumpRx's offerings.

title: BioMarin drug acquired in buyout misses goal in rare disease study
summary: Tested in a condition known as ENPP1 deficiency, the treatment failed a trial goal that’s important to regulators, spurring doubts about its approval prospects.

title: A migraine drugmaker heads to the public markets through reverse merger
summary: Mentari Therapeutics, a spinout from the prolific hub-and-spoke biotech Paragon, is developing two medications it hopes can treat migraines that aren’t well controlled by existing drugs.

title: STAT+: Dexcom CEO hints at future uses for CGM
summary: In this edition of STAT Health Tech: Takeaways from a conversation with Dexcom CEO, and updates on WiSeR, and Epic's market share.

title: STAT+: A new ranking of pharma companies by R&D performance
summary: Maryland drug board to cap price of Ozempic, TrumpRx partners with Cuban, GoodRx, and more biotech news

title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about a Supreme Court setback for pharma, TrumpRx expands and much more
summary: The latest pharmaceutical news from the Pharmalot campus via the Pharmalittle newsletter

title: Relay drug shows early promise against rare blood vessel diseases
summary: While early, the findings suggest the therapy could be superior to Novartis’ Vijoice at treating “vascular anomalies,” a cluster of chronic conditions with few available treatments.

title: STAT+: Eli Lilly tops prominent rankings on pharma R&D performance
summary: A new set of lists ranks drug company laboratories on two criteria: innovation and invention.

title: The latest on Ebola: A travel ban and an old vaccine
summary: Affordable Care Act changes, drinking while pregnant, and more health news from Morning Rounds

title: Opinion: I’m a heart transplant recipient. I’m haunted by ‘ghost approval’ for medication I need to survive
summary: “On paper, I have insurance coverage. In real life, I don’t have access. That’s what I call ‘ghost approval,’” writes patient advocate Payton Herres.

title: Opinion: Britain embraces a Massachusetts experiment on tobacco regulation — just as the state might roll it back
summary: Britain embraces a Massachusetts experiment on tobacco regulation — just as the commonwealth might roll it back.

title: STAT+: 1 in 8 women drink during pregnancy. Experts dread the consequences
summary: More than 1 in 8 pregnant women report drinking. Doctors warn fetal alcohol disorders may be more common than many realize, perhaps more common than autism.

title: Realizing the potential of agonistic antibody immunotherapy
STAT+: Maryland state affordability board places a price cap on Ozempic
summary: Nine states have been pursuing the idea of prescription drug affordability boards. Maryland's board just set limits on the price of Ozempic.

title: STAT+: White House taps Amazon, GoodRx, and Mark Cuban to bolster TrumpRx
summary: Trump's drug discount platform adds 600 generic medications via major online pharmacies.

title: With no approved vaccine for Ebola outbreak, experts weigh testing a long shot
summary: With no approved vaccine for the fast-growing Ebola outbreak in the DRC, experts weigh testing one with unknown protection.

title: FDA approves AstraZeneca’s new kind of hypertension drug
summary: Baxfendy inhibits a blood-pressure-raising enzyme and, according to AstraZeneca executives, is poised to be a “big product” that should ultimately generate $5 billion or more in annual sales.

title: Merck ADC, licensed from China, hits mark in first big global trial
summary: The endometrial cancer trial is the first of 17 late-stage studies Merck is running for a therapy that’s important to its ambitions of hitting $70 billion in annual sales next decade.

title: Høeg fired in latest FDA shakeup; 20 people die after taking Amgen drug
summary: The agency has once again shuffled the leadership for two top drug review offices. Elsewhere, Parabilis partnered with Regeneron and an obesity pill is headed toward an approval in China.

title: Regeneron immunotherapy combo comes up short in melanoma trial
summary: A two-drug regimen of Regeneron’s fianlimab and Libtayo didn’t significantly outperform Keytruda in a late-stage study, a finding that surprised Wall Street analysts and wiped out billions in market…

title: Unlocking more value from mature drug products through strategic outsourcing
summary: See how strategic outsourcing can maximize value and reduce costs for mature drug portfolios.

title: Autophagy modulation in cancer
FDA hold puts Aardvark Prader-Willi drug in limbo
summary: The company plans to unblind the late-stage study that was halted due to safety concerns, which could lead to an overhaul of its entire development program.

title: Supreme Court preserves access to abortion pill by mail
summary: The ruling maintains access to the drug while litigation continues. Mifepristone can still be prescribed at pharmacies or by mail without requiring in-person visits.
